name: finance-tracker
description: Obsidian plugin for capturing spending from Apple Shortcuts, updating daily note totals, and visualizing weekly finance data.
author: Antoine Haddad

scripts.build: node -e "['main.js','manifest.json','styles.css'].forEach(f=>require('fs').accessSync(f))" && echo 'No bundler: main.js is authored directly (see README#Development). Verified release files are present.'
